name: Jim Zhou
title: Principal Software Development Engineer
summary: Principal SDE at Fortinet with ~5 years of experience building high-performance backend systems and cloud-native security infrastructure. Deep expertise in Go, Python, and distributed systems. Currently pivoting toward AI infrastructure — studying LLM serving, GPU inference optimization, and building hands-on projects in ML systems. Targeting Senior+ engineering roles at top tech companies, especially in AI-adjacent domains.

bullets: Led architecture and development of core SASE (Secure Access Service Edge) platform components serving millions of endpoints globally
Designed and built high-throughput data pipeline processing 10B+ security events daily with sub-second latency
Drove adoption of microservices architecture, migrating monolithic services to Kubernetes-based infrastructure
Mentored team of 5 engineers, conducted code reviews, and established engineering best practices
Built real-time threat detection engine using Go, processing network traffic at wire speed
Implemented distributed caching layer reducing API latency by 60%
Contributed to FortiSASE cloud platform from early-stage development to production launch
